zh.Roskilde Domkirche, Roskilde, Kobenhaven: 丹麥洛斯吉爾德洛斯吉爾德
zh.Nyköping, Södermanland, Sweden: 瑞典索德曼藍德尼可平
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sofia Eriksdotter於大約1240年出生在丹麥洛斯吉爾德洛斯吉爾德時，她的父親KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark25歲，母親Jutta of Saxony19歲。她於1260年與Valdemar Birgersson Folkungaätten結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1286年在丹麥享年47歲。

zh-hans.Roskilde Domkirche, Roskilde, Kobenhaven: 丹麦洛斯吉爾德洛斯吉爾德
zh-hans.Nyköping, Södermanland, Sweden: 瑞典索德曼藍德尼可平
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sofia Eriksdotter于大约1240年出生在丹麦洛斯吉爾德洛斯吉爾德时，她的父亲KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark25岁，母亲Jutta of Saxony19岁。她于1260年与Valdemar Birgersson Folkungaätten结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1286年在丹麦享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sofia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sophia
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Sofia Eriksdotter was born about 1240, in Roskilde, Roskilde, Denmark, her father, KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark, was 25 and her mother, Jutta of Saxony, was 19. She married Valdemar Birgersson Folkungaätten in 1260. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1286, in Denmark, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sofia Eriksdotter est née environ 1240, à Roskilde, Roskilde, Danemark, son père, KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jutta of Saxony, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Valdemar Birgersson Folkungaätten en 1260. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1286, à Danemark, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sofia Eriksdotter um 1240 in Roskilde, Roskilde, Dänemark geboren wurde, war ihr Vater KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark 25 und ihre Mutter Jutta of Saxony 19. Sie hat 1260 Valdemar Birgersson Folkungaätten geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1286 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Dänemark.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sofia Eriksdotter è nata il circa 1240 nel Roskilde, Roskilde, Danimarca, sua padre, KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Jutta of Saxony, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Valdemar Birgersson Folkungaätten nel 1260. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1286, nel Danimarca, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Roskilde Domkirche, Roskilde, Kobenhaven: デンマークロスキルドロスキルド
ja.Nyköping, Södermanland, Sweden: スウェーデンスoデルマンランドニークoパング
ja.New Yorkkoping, Södermanland, Sweden: スウェーデンスoデルマンランド
ja.lifeSummary: Sofia Eriksdotterが約1240年にデンマークロスキルドロスキルドで生まれた時，父KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmarkは25歳，母Jutta of Saxonyは19歳であった。1260年にValdemar Birgersson Folkungaättenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1286年にデンマークで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sofia Eriksdotter(이)가 대략 1240년 덴마크 로스킬드 로스킬드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jutta of Saxony(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1260년 Valdemar Birgersson Folkungaätten(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1286년 덴마크에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sofia Eriksdotter nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Roskilde, Roskilde, Dinamarca, seu pai, KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jutta of Saxony, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Valdemar Birgersson Folkungaätten em 1260. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1286, em Dinamarca, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sofia Eriksdotter родилась около 1240 г. в местности роскаилд, роскаилд, Дания, её отцу по имени KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jutta of Saxony, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Valdemar Birgersson Folkungaätten в 1260 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1286 г. в местности Дания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sofia Eriksdotter nació aproximadamente 1240, en Roskilde, Roskilde, Dinamarca, su papá, KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Jutta of Saxony, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Valdemar Birgersson Folkungaätten en 1260. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1286, en Dinamarca, a la edad de 47 años.
